arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Hansi Flick rules out exit for Spain star amid Premier League speculation
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick says that he is expecting Chelsea-linked Gavi to stay "for many years" at Camp Nou amid the speculation surrounding his future.

arts.ttl: Barcelona youth talent spotted in first-team training before Atlético
arts.sum: An up-and-coming member of the goalkeeper ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona was afforded the chance to impress as part of first-team training on Saturday. The player in question? Max…

arts.ttl: Tottenham eyeing bargain move for Englishman likened to Barcelona star
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are eyeing a Bosman move for the former Manchester United academy graduate Angel Gomes. Tottenham are constantly on the lookout for great opportunities in the market and they seem to have found one in Angel Gomes. According to a report from Football Insider, the North London club are very keen on signing the […] The post Tottenham eyeing bargain move for Englishman likened to Barcelona star appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man United 'have £55m bid rejected' for Barca star as Hansi Flick opens door to potential departure
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly fail with a £55m bid for Barcelona midfielder Frenkie de Jong, who is in the final 18 months of his contract at Camp Nou.

arts.ttl: Flick talks De Jong future, Atletico and brilliant Balde
arts.sum: Hansi Flick has been asked about Frenkie de Jong’s future on the club and doesn’t seem too sure about whether the midfielder will stay at Barcelona. At the end of the first game we were not as focused as we wanted,” he added.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star Pedri draws comparisons to Man City legend: ‘He’s reaching that level’

arts.ttl: Atlético Madrid vs FC Barcelona: LaLiga EA Sports, how to watch on TV and stream in the USA
arts.sum: Diego Simeone will be desperate for a positive result on Sunday night as table topping FC Barcelona are the visitors to the Estadio Metropolitano. Sunday’s game rounds off matchday 28 in LaLiga and is a fitting finale as club’s now break for the international window with no domestic action until the end of March.

arts.ttl: Flick warns Barça not to switch off vs. Atlético
arts.sum: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick has warned his players not to switch off when they travel to Atlético Madrid in LaLiga this weekend.
